title: Villager AI
description: A local AI mod that adds real, talking villagers! All for free with zero manual setup!
body:
Have you seen Fortnite's addition of Darth Vader as an AI NPC back in May of 2025? Well, **Villager AI** brings that same life to Minecraft Villagers! **Villager AI** is a server-side [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) addon that expands the intelligence of Minecraft villagers with AI. With this mod, villagers can hear what you say, form intelligent responses, and talk back with their own, audible, villagerified voice!



# Notice
This addon depends on [Locrow AI](https://modrinth.com/mod/locrowai), which was in minimal release, supporting a small selection of systems. Check that mod page to see the supported systems before installing! Now, it is discontinued. This mod will not receive updates until the Locrow AI library mod is rereleased.
